failedAssertions.reason: Document replacement chain: uploadCitizenDocument does not set replacesDocumentId when creating new version. markPreviousDocumentsAsNotCurrent() marks old doc as not current but doesn't capture and pass previous document ID to new document's replacesDocumentId field.
Admin reassignment flow: preview succeeds but actual reassignment returns Internal Server Error (500). Additionally, no audit trail entry for 'reassign' action exists in audit_event table.

blockedAssertions.blockedBy: Admin document review UI not accessible through navigation - DocumentReviewModal.tsx exists in codebase but no route/menu item provides access. No citizen account with active service requests/documents available for testing.

appliedUpdates.description: Added note: HTTP API for documents returns 500 for /api/rpc/documents/* routes - testing via direct service calls required. Bypass: use bun to call service functions directly or investigate RPC router configuration.
